experiences.title: Scuba Diving
experiences.description: Dive into crystal-clear waters and explore vibrant coral reefs alongside experienced guides.

experiences.title: Watersports
experiences.description: Have some fun on the water with activities like jet skiing, paddleboarding, and kayaking.

experiences.title: Fishing
experiences.description: Enjoy a relaxing fishing trip at sunrise or sunset, and try your luck catching fresh local fish.

experiences.title: Manta, Dolphin, Whale Shark Cruise
experiences.description: Chart a course through remote atolls, local fishing villages and pristine beaches.Cruise through the open ocean and spot manta rays, dolphins, and whale sharks in the wild.

experiences.title: Sand Bank Trip
experiences.description: Unwind on a quiet sandbank surrounded by nothing but turquoise waters and open skies.

experiences.title: Snorkeling Trip
experiences.description: Snorkel through clear waters and discover colorful reefs and marine life up close.

experiences.title: Resort Day Trip
experiences.description: Spend the day at a luxury island resort, enjoying great food, spa treatments, and beautiful surroundings.

experiences.title: Water Golf
experiences.description: Try something different with a fun round of golf at sea, hitting eco-friendly balls into the ocean.
